name: Reflex Plus Kitten Food Pouch - Lamb Chunks in Gravy 100g
shortDescription: (4 pieces minimum order) Fully-balanced, lamb protein-containing canned (wet) cat food carefully formulated by cat / dog nutritionists to meet the nutritional requirements of all breeds.
description: Reflex Plus Lamb Chunks in Gravy Kitten Food in Pouch , fully-balanced, lamb protein-containing cat food carefully formulated by cat / dog nutritionists to meet the nutritional requirements of all breeds. NUTRIENT COMPONENTS Crude Protein (%) - 8.0 Crude Oils & Fats (%) - 5.0 Crude Fiber (%) - 0.3 Moisture (%) - 83 Crude Ash (%) - 2.0 Vitamin D3 - 250 IU Vitamin E - 15 mg/kg Copper -?1.0 mg/kg Biotin - 20 ?g/kg Manganese - 1.0 mg/kg Zinc - 15 mg/kg Taurine - 445 mg/kg INGREDIENTS: Meat & Animal Derivatives (5% lamb, minerals, inulin (0.1%). FEEDING RECOMMENDATION: One pouch per meal. An adult cat (approx. 4kg) requires up to 3 meals per day. Individual requirements depend on factors like age, breed and activity. Serve at room temperature. Store in a cool, dry place. Not fit for human consumption.
